__doc: Synthetic example-UUID registry — the publish-surface leak gate's allowlist.
Every real-shape UUID in this repository (all of it is public + npm-published)
MUST be listed here, or scripts/verify-example-ids.mjs fails CI and prepublish.
To add an example id: mint a fresh random UUID (`uuidgen`), confirm it references
no real system, register it with a one-line use note. NEVER copy an identifier
out of a real request, response, webhook delivery, or operator fixture flow —
operator-substrate ids are real by construction and leak (one reached the npm
